description: Customer wants to send back a delivered item from a fulfilled order. The agent should open a return with create_return (no refund yet - the items must come back first) and notify the customer, not refund, cancel, or escalate. Advisory: simulated tool execution; the gated property is that a fulfilled order is handled with a return rather than a premature refund or a hollow escalation.

messages.contentText: The boots I ordered on order #2020 don't fit me at all. I'd like to send them back for a return.

simulateToolResults.result: Opened return #2020-R1 (status OPEN) on order 9000002020 for: 1x Leather Boots. No refund was issued - this only authorizes the customer to send the items back.
Reply sent to customer via email.

instruction: Reply to the customer and set up their return.
